PenPal Draw v0.2.2 - Windows Distribution
==========================================

A drawing app for XPPen Artist 15.6 Pro V2 and other pen tablets.

This is release v0.2.2 with all latest fixes!

FILES INCLUDED
--------------

Option 1 - Installer (Recommended):
  penpal-draw_0.2.2_x64-setup.exe
  - Easy installation wizard
  - Adds to Start Menu
  - Can be uninstalled from Control Panel

Option 2 - MSI Installer:
  penpal-draw_0.2.2_x64_en-US.msi
  - For IT administrators
  - Silent install support

Option 3 - Portable (No install):
  penpal-draw-v0.2.2-windows-portable.zip
  - Extract and run penpal-draw.exe
  - No installation needed

QUICK START
-----------
1. Install or extract the app
2. Connect your XPPen tablet
3. Launch PenPal Draw
4. Press F1 for Help

WHAT'S NEW IN v0.2.2
--------------------
- Fixed brush preview in Custom Brush creator
- Updated GitHub Actions for Node.js 24 compatibility
- Security audit fixes (XSS prevention, input validation)
- Added in-app help system

Enjoy drawing! 🎨
